facts.claim: Salalah is the capital and largest city of the southern Omani governorate of Dhofar.

Oman stretches 1,700 km along the Arabian Sea and Gulf of Oman, from the Strait of Hormuz to the Yemen border. Muscat’s districts like Muttrah and Ruwi offer historic ports and commercial hubs amid coastal landscapes.
Salalah (Arabic: صَلَالَة, romanized: Ṣalālah) is the capital and largest city of the southern Omani governorate of Dhofar. It has a population close to 331,949.[1]
